subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! God willing, mayest thou cling unto the Divine Lote-Tree with such firmness that the diverse winds of the world shall not cause thee to waver [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه انشاء الله بسدره تمسک نمائی تمسکیکه اریاح مختلفه عالم او را حرکت ندهد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
